# Sharing

**Slug:** `sharing` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 9

Manage how your users and groups can access your Talend Cloud entities.

[← Back to API index](./README.md)

## Tools by tag

- [Eligibles](#eligibles) (1)
- [Levels](#levels) (1)
- [SharingSet](#sharingset) (4)
- [Sharings](#sharings) (3)

## Eligibles

### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsEligiblesEntitytype`

```
GET /sharing/sharings/eligibles/{entityType}
```

Get eligible users/groups for sharing

Use this method to retrieve the list of users and groups with whom a specific entity type can be shared.
The list of available users and groups changes depending on which permissions they are assigned in Talend Management Console.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


## Levels

### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsLevelsEntitytype`

```
GET /sharing/sharings/levels/{entityType}
```

Get the access levels of an entity

 An access level defines to what extent the user or the group will be able to interact with the entity. In Talend Cloud, the available levels are Viewer, Editor, and Owner. Depending on the level, a user will have read-only or write permissions for example.
Use this method to retrieve the available access levels of the specified entity type.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


## Sharings

### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsEntitytype`

```
GET /sharing/sharings/{entityType}
```

Get the entities that the current user has access to

Use this method to retrieve the list of all entities of a given type that the current user has access to.
This list of access also includes the access level and the UUID of the entity.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `includeMetadata` | query | `boolean` | no |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsEntitytypeEntityid`

```
GET /sharing/sharings/{entityType}/{entityId}
```

Get users/groups' access information to an entity

Use this method to get the list of computed accesses by users or groups to a given entity.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `entityId` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `includeMetadata` | query | `boolean` | no |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsEntitytypeEntityidEntitlements`

```
GET /sharing/sharings/{entityType}/{entityId}/entitlements
```

Get the list of permissions for an entity

Use this method to rerieve a list of available permissions for a given entity.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `entityId` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


## SharingSet

### `sharing__getApiV1SharingsetEntitytypeEntityid`

```
GET /sharing/sharingset/{entityType}/{entityId}
```

Get a sharingset for an entity

Use this method to retrieve a sharingset.
A sharingset represents the full list of users and groups who have access to the specified entity.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `entityId` | path | `string` | yes | UUID |
| `foreignEntityType` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `limit` | query | `integer` | no | Limits the number of elements displayed in the sharingset. |
| `offset` | query | `integer` | no |  |
| `includeDeletedSharings` | query | `boolean` | no | True or false |
| `foreignEntityId` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |


### `sharing__patchApiV1Sharingset`

```
PATCH /sharing/sharingset
```

Patch a sharingset

A sharingset represents a list of users and groups.
Use this method to patch a list of sharingsets. The PATCH operation allows you to apply specific changes to the sharingset without replacing it entirely.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `BulkSharingSetRequest`. Schema: `BulkSharingSetRequest`.


### `sharing__patchApiV1SharingsetEntitytypeEntityid`

```
PATCH /sharing/sharingset/{entityType}/{entityId}
```

Patch a sharingset for an entity

A sharingset represents the full list of users and groups who have access to the specified entity. Use this method to patch the sharingset and define who can access a given entity, and with which access level (viewer, editor, owner).
Unlike the PUT operation that replaces the whole sharingset, the PATCH operation allows you to apply specific changes to the sharingset. A missing level stands for a removal command of a user or group sharing.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `entityId` | path | `string` | yes | UUID |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `PatchSharingSetRequest`. Schema: `PatchSharingSetRequest`.


### `sharing__putApiV1SharingsetEntitytypeEntityid`

```
PUT /sharing/sharingset/{entityType}/{entityId}
```

Update a sharingset for an entity

A sharingset represents the full list of users and groups who have access to the specified entity.
Use this method to update the sharingset by defining who can access a given entity, and with which access level (viewer, editor, owner). This PUT operation allows you to replace the whole sharingset with the new information.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `entityType` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `entityId` | path | `string` | yes | UUID |
| `X-CLIENT-VERSION` | header | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `PutSharingSetRequest`. Schema: `PutSharingSetRequest`.
